text:
There once was a boy named Timmy who loved nothing more than collecting shiny things. His room was a treasure trove, with little shiny things lining every shelf. It wasn't just shiny things either. He loved stickers, shiny beads, shiny rocks.

One day, while playing outside, Timmy found a shiny coin shaped like a sea lion. It shimmered gold in the sunlight, calling out to him. Curious, he tucked it into his pocket.

Later, he convinced his sister to let him carry her favorite book outside. Along the way home, he noticed a tiny, shiny beetle scuttling across the pavement. Intrigued, he picked it up.

That night, Timmy couldn't sleep. His mind raced with memories of shiny things he'd seen. He dreamed of a sea lion telling him secrets about hidden treasures.

The next day, he begged his mom to let him search for the sea lion coin. They ventured outside the house into the woods behind it. Nothing
